findings.description: PascalCase class names LoginUserPrincipal, ProjectDto, MessageUtil, and ProjectProfit appear in the source code for section s1 (edit() and confirmOfUpdate() methods) but are not listed in hints.
findings.source_evidence: edit()メソッド: `LoginUserPrincipal userContext = SessionUtil.get(context, "userContext")`, `ProjectDto dto = UniversalDao.findBySqlFile(ProjectDto.class, ...)`, `BeanUtil.createAndCopy(Project.class, dto)`. confirmOfUpdate()メソッド: `MessageUtil.createMessage(...)`, `new ProjectProfit(project.getSales(), ...)`, `BeanUtil.createAndCopy(ProjectDto.class, form)`

findings.description: PascalCase class name Project (entity) and annotation @Column appear in the source code for section s2 (楽観的ロック用エンティティ定義) but are not listed in hints.
findings.source_evidence: Project.java: `private Long version;` with `@Version` and `@Column(name = "VERSION", precision = 19, nullable = false, unique = false)` on the getter. Also `Project targetProject = SessionUtil.delete(context, "project"); UniversalDao.update(targetProject);` in update().
